recommended_paths: Block finalization until the missing Flutter source is tracked, then close the public account-profile validation gap and move account/profile filters earlier in the occurrence aggregation path or prove the current query shape remains bounded.
exact_next_step: Record reviewer resolutions in the governing TODO using the machine-checkable resolution table or equivalent gate ledger, then extract the derived resolution packet and decide whether another bounded review pass is still required.

findings.title: Round 04 reproducibility is still broken by an untracked imported Flutter source file
findings.rationale: A tracked import depended on an untracked Flutter adapter file, so a clean checkout or generated diff would omit required source.
findings.suggested_action: Track the missing source file and add a deterministic pre-audit check for tracked imports resolved only by untracked source.

findings.title: Public account-profile index still consumes unbounded query inputs outside a FormRequest
findings.rationale: The controller passed raw query input to publicPaginate while the service consumed search, profile type, nested filter, and taxonomy keys.
findings.suggested_action: Introduce a public account-profile index FormRequest covering every consumed query key, pass only validated input, and add negative tests for oversized search/profile-type payloads.

findings.title: Account/profile filters are applied after grouping and event lookup in temporal occurrence pagination
findings.rationale: The management occurrence pipeline grouped temporal occurrence rows before applying account, venue, and related-profile filters that could be narrowed on occurrence snapshots.
findings.suggested_action: Push account, venue, and related-profile predicates into the initial occurrence match where snapshot fields permit it, retaining event lookup as authority check if needed.
